module_info.docstring: Tests for get_active_environments_info disk usage calculation.

methods.name: test_only_counts_matching_task_dirs
methods.docstring: Each task should only count its own directories, not all hermes-* dirs.

methods.name: test_multiple_tasks_no_double_counting
methods.docstring: With 2 active tasks, each should count only its own dirs.

functions.name: fake_scratch
functions.docstring: Create fake hermes scratch directories with known sizes.
